name: organic_recall_100_cases
description: Balanced organic recall model-eval fixture set: 100 cases, difficulties 1 through 5, 20 cases each.

difficulty_scale.2: Direct recall with simple filtering, status, or source distractors.
difficulty_scale.3: Multi-fact synthesis across two or more memories or sources.
difficulty_scale.4: Precise filtering under distractors, status conflicts, or scoped exclusions.
difficulty_scale.5: High-constraint synthesis across multiple domains with stale/deleted exclusions.

seed_inserts.input: Daniele lives in London.
Nur and Sara are Daniele's twin daughters.
Nur practices violin on Tuesdays.
Sara has swimming lessons on Thursdays.
Daniele usually handles school pickup on Fridays.
Sam works at Goldman.
Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
Sam likes Taylor Swift.
Sam recommended Ronnie Scott's for live jazz in London.
Alex Chen works at Stripe on billing infrastructure.
Maya Patel is a security engineer at Cloudflare.
Ravi works at Anthropic on eval infrastructure.
Lucia is translating Anna Banti notes from Italian to English.
Brain DB remains the source of truth for memory lifecycle state.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the authority for lifecycle state.
Cognee sync rows should mark failed projections stale before retrying them.
Public MCP tools should expose high-level remember, recall, ingest_source, and admin sync operations only.
Low-level SQL and raw Cognee operations must not be exposed as public MCP tools.
Cognee OAuth compatibility routes OpenAI text calls through the Codex bearer token adapter.
The local Cognee backend runs add and cognify directly for ingestion benchmarks.
Current Cognee model-selection evidence favors gpt-5.4-mini ingestion for speed-sensitive local use.
The gpt-5.5 high-effort ingestion candidate was much slower and did not clearly improve recall quality.
Manetti candidate answers are scored by a gpt-5.5 judge on a 1 to 5 scale.
The Manetti evaluation uses one hundred LLM-generated questions read from the full corpus, ranked from easy to hard.

seed_inserts.title: Brain/Cognee design chat
seed_inserts.input:
# Brain/Cognee design chat
Brain DB remains source of truth. Cognee is rebuildable. MCP should expose high-level tools. Open question: how much source text should be projected into semantic recall?

seed_inserts.title: AI memory design
seed_inserts.input: AI memory systems need durable source evidence. Atomic memory cards should be traceable. Semantic indexes improve recall but application databases should own lifecycle and conflict state.

seed_inserts.title: Banti research notes
seed_inserts.input: Anna Banti's La camicia bruciata is read through Marguerite Louise, Violante, historical truth, and hypothetical interpretation of archival gaps.

seed_inserts.title: Preference distractor table
seed_inserts.input:
| Person | Preference |
| --- | --- |
| Sam | Bill Evans |
| Daniele | Knowledge graphs |
| Maya | Cloudflare papers |

seed_inserts.title: MCP release notes
seed_inserts.input: Release notes: add OAuth protected resource metadata, keep Slack routes separate from /mcp, and reject legacy low-level tools.
I want to learn more about knowledge graphs for memory recall.
Open question: should LLM question generation read the whole corpus instead of artificial chunks?
Open question: repeat the same one hundred questions with gpt-5.5 low as the recall model.
I want to learn more about basic Python.
Follow up on whether Slack memory agent needs a backup notification channel.
Daniele wants to try Chateau Musar 2016.
Daniele wants to try Noble Rot for wine-focused dining.
Daniele liked the movie Coherence for its puzzle-box structure.
Daniele loved listening to Kind of Blue.
Daniele disliked Partagas Serie D No. 4.
Production backups should include the main Cognee database and LanceDB archive.
Production deploys run live model smoke checks before promotion.
Cloudflare routes Slack traffic to the Slack agent before the MCP catchall route.
Local production manages separate launchd services for MCP, UI, and Slack agent.
Cognee is the source of truth for all memory lifecycle state.
Expose raw SQL as a public MCP tool for debugging.
Use gpt-5.5 high-effort ingestion as the default for all Cognee datasets.

recall_cases.query: Summarize the model-eval plan from question generation through scoring and remaining run, with no chunk boundary assumption.

Explain the security posture across OAuth, MCP tool exposure, route separation, and deleted SQL debug ideas.
